title: Python Fuzzy Matching Data Deduplication
overview: Automated Python data cleaning pipeline using fuzzy string matching algorithms to deduplicate vendor and product records prior to BI ingestion.
challenge: Duplicate vendor names from disparate ERP systems degraded analytics accuracy for GE Power compliance auditing.
solution: Developed a Python script utilizing Levenshtein distance and Jaro-Winkler algorithms to auto-merge vendor records.
archExplanation: Raw staging tables are processed by Python scheduled job; cleaned output tables are written to Greenplum DB for Tableau consumption.
impact: $50K USD annual savings in compliance auditing effort
learnings: Pre-blocking string matches by state/city reduces comparison complexity from O(n^2) to O(n)
Confidence score thresholds should be tuned with business stewards
